name: Rogz Nightcat Safety Collar Small Lime Swallows (Cb08-L)
description: The Rogz Night Cat Safety Collar combines safety, style, and durability perfect for cats who love nighttime adventures. Made from snag-free 100% polyester webbing , this collar features a stitched-on reflective design for enhanced visibility in low-light conditions. Whether your cat is exploring the garden or sneaking around the house, you’ll have peace of mind knowing they’re easier to spot in the dark. The collar is equipped with a breakaway safety buckle that’s designed to release if it gets caught, ensuring your cat can safely break free when needed. With an 11mm width and an adjustable fit for neck sizes 20–31cm , it’s suitable for most adult cats and offers a comfortable yet secure fit. Key Features: Reflective stitching for added night-time visibility Snag-free, durable 100% polyester webbing Breakaway safety buckle for safe escapes Adjustable fit : 20–31cm neck size | Width : 11mm Stylish and secure for everyday wear Keep your cat safe and seen after dark with the Rogz Night Cat Safety Collar designed for both function and flair.
